positive: A stylized cosmic floral arrangement, featuring intricate silhouettes of bioluminescent nebula swirls, stylized lunar phases, and delicate, geometric space plants. The overall composition should be highly centralized and balanced, rendered in a rich, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, vibrant teal, burnt orange, and shimmering gold accents. The style must be a fusion of Art Nouveau elegance and deep space cartography, with clean, crisp lines and a matte, screen-print texture. The pattern should be seamlessly tileable, embodying a mystical, dreamlike aesthetic suitable for apparel, emphasizing strong contrast and clear separation of elements. Minimal depth of field, vector art quality, clean silhouette, 8k detail.
